3019.issue: [W3019] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("npm", "github-actions") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.4" at [package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.ikettle2/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
